title: Consistent Buckets
description: Makes all buckets consistent with the Programmer Art bucket texture. Displays axolotl variants
body:
Makes all buckets consistent with the Programmer Art bucket texture.

Shows the axolotl variant in a bucket (requires OptiFine or [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)).

Features an add-on compatible with Konci's [Melanoid Axolotls](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/melanoid-axolotls) resource pack. Download from the [project page](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/consistent-buckets-melanoid).

***

Project page on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/consistent-buckets-programmer-art).
